steps: The ratio of flour to sugar is 3:1, meaning for every 3 cups of flour, 1 cup of sugar is used. If 6 cups of flour are used, we can set up the proportion: 3/1 = 6/x, where x is the cups of sugar needed. Cross-multiplying gives 3x = 6, so x = 2. Alternatively, 6 cups of flour is twice 3 cups, so sugar needed is twice 1 cup = 2 cups.
